summary: Iteration 42 - Lead Management Module Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Twilio WhatsApp webhook, Razorpay payment links, lead notes/activities/reminders, and ad-city mappings are all working correctly.

lead_statuses_api.GET /api/leads/statuses: PASS - Returns all 22 lead statuses with value, label, color

twilio_whatsapp_webhook.POST /api/webhooks/twilio/whatsapp: PASS - Creates lead from WhatsApp message
twilio_whatsapp_webhook.form_data_parsing: PASS - Correctly parses From, Body, ProfileName, WaId, MessageSid
twilio_whatsapp_webhook.ad_id_extraction: PASS - Extracts ad_id from message body using regex
twilio_whatsapp_webhook.duplicate_handling: PASS - Updates existing lead if phone number exists

lead_crud.GET /api/leads/{id}: PASS - Returns single lead with all details
lead_crud.PATCH /api/leads/{id}/status: PASS - Updates lead status with activity logging
lead_crud.invalid_status_validation: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid status values

lead_notes.POST /api/leads/{id}/notes: PASS - Adds note to lead with user info
lead_notes.GET /api/leads/{id}/notes: PASS - Returns all notes for lead sorted by created_at

lead_activities.GET /api/leads/{id}/activities: PASS - Returns activity log with actions: lead_created, status_changed, note_added, payment_link_created

lead_reminder.POST /api/leads/{id}/reminder: PASS - Sets reminder_date, reminder_time, reminder_reason on lead

razorpay_payment_link.lead_status_update: PASS - Updates lead status to 'PAYMENT LINK SENT'
razorpay_payment_link.activity_logging: PASS - Logs payment_link_created activity with amount and package

round_robin_assignment.auto_assignment: PASS - Leads are auto-assigned based on city (if sales reps available)

critical_code_review_comments: Twilio WhatsApp webhook correctly parses form data and extracts ad_id using regex
Razorpay integration is LIVE (not mocked) - payment links are being created successfully
Activity logging is comprehensive - tracks lead_created, status_changed, note_added, payment_link_created
Round-robin assignment works but requires sales reps to be assigned to cities
Lead status validation correctly rejects invalid status values
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via WhatsApp webhook during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Management Module is fully implemented and tested. Key integrations: 1) Twilio WhatsApp webhook at /api/webhooks/twilio/whatsapp receives Meta ad leads, 2) Razorpay payment links are LIVE (not sandbox), 3) Round-robin assignment requires sales reps to have assigned_cities field populated. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_lead_management.py

integration_status.twilio_whatsapp: LIVE - Configured with TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
